steps.title: Equate the two kinetic energy formulas
steps.content:
Since both expressions describe the kinetic energy of the same object, they must be equal:
$$\frac{1}{2}mv^2 = 36v^2$$

steps.title: Solve for mass
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $v^2$ (assuming $v \neq 0$):
$$\frac{1}{2}m = 36$$
Multiply both sides by 2:
$$m = 72$$
That confirms B is correct.
